headline: Analysts Estimate NextEra Energy (NEE) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
summary: NextEra (NEE) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
